color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AI RAG Project
FastAPI + RAG + Multi-Scene Assistant

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
FastAPI
HTTP API 与路由框架

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Uvicorn
ASGI 服务启动与本地运行

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LangChain
RAG 组链、Retriever 与 Prompt 组合

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LangGraph
为 Agentic / 多步编排预留的运行图能力

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
langchain-openai
把外部聊天模型接成 LangChain ChatModel

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pydantic + pydantic-settings
配置建模、请求响应校验与环境变量装配

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
python-dotenv
加载 backend/.env 配置

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SQLite
会话与聊天记忆持久化

span.p:
Chroma

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Elasticsearch
可切换的向量检索后端

span.p:
DashScope Compatible API
默认接入 Qwen 模型能力

span.p:
颜色说明
蓝色=关键依赖
绿色=中间件
粉色=外部 API
